# Wolf Nutrition

> Wolf Nutrition is a locally owned nutrition club in Hot Springs, Arkansas, serving energizing loaded teas, protein shakes, and cold-brew protein coffee since 2018. Walk-ins welcome Monday through Saturday.

## Visit

- **Address:** 1759 Airport Rd, Suite C, Hot Springs, AR 71913
- **Phone:** (501) 463-4144
- **Google Maps:** https://share.google/L0grmqgFYNhysCUSI
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/wolfnutritionhotsprings
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/wolfnutritionhotsprings/
- **Coordinates:** 34.4631887559142, -93.14547950273685

## Hours

- Sunday: Closed
- Monday: 6:00 AM – 5:30 PM
- Tuesday: 6:00 AM – 5:30 PM
- Wednesday: 6:00 AM – 5:30 PM
- Thursday: 6:00 AM – 5:30 PM
- Friday: 6:00 AM – 5:30 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

## What We Serve

- **Energizing Teas** — loaded with electrolytes, B-vitamins, and clean energy
- **Protein Coffee** — cold-brewed coffee packed with protein
- **Healthy Shakes** — meal-replacement protein shakes in dozens of flavors

Also available: skin & hair products, energy & fitness products, protein bars.

## Recognition

- 4.7 stars on Google — 124 reviews — see all at https://share.google/L0grmqgFYNhysCUSI
- Locally owned since 2018

## About

Wolf Nutrition is locally owned and operated, proudly serving the Hot Springs, Arkansas community and surrounding areas since 2018. Independent Herbalife Distributor.
